CoverageSection.title: Coverage and Conditions
CoverageSection.subtitle: Discover all our destinations
CoverageSection.description: Our services are available in the main cities of Mexico. Logistics are adapted to each destination to ensure your experience is perfect.

WhyUsSection.title: We customize every detail of your trip

feature.title: Tailor-made experiences
feature.description: Our services are available in the best destinations in Mexico. You can add additional elements with a personalized quote according to your dreams.

coverage.title:
Coverage and
General Conditions
coverage.description: Our services are available in different cities and destinations within Mexico. Availability, logistics, and additional costs may vary depending on the type of experience and the selected plan.

personalize.title: Personalize your experience
personalize.description: If you wish to hold your experience in a city or destination not on this list, contact us for a personalized quote based on location and required logistics.

AboutPage.quote: Each experience can be adjusted and scaled according to the level of production you desire.

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.subtitle: We recommend making your reservation at least one week in advance.
reservations.description: For premium experiences, special destinations, or high seasons, it is suggested to book further in advance to ensure availability of locations, providers, and production.

extras.subtitle: Depending on the service and plan contracted, you can add additional elements with a personalized quote, such as:
